baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Once per year: during the auction phase, you may inspect one face-down market card before bidding (if any are face-down per variant rules). If all cards are face-up, gain +1 to your first bid this year instead. Synergizes with Tax Attorney's MARKET PREVIEW — stacked intelligence gives bidding advantage.
+1 loan cap after 2 consecutive years without a negative value roll.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MFG asset you own (max +2).

flavourText: Leverage other people's companies, then leverage the leverage.
